title: Observed pit-stop debt state
summary: Use the current-row `PitStop` feature to count prior and current observed stops within each driver-race sequence.
rationale: `PitStop` is available in both train and test as a current-lap feature, and several variants found value in chronological stop-count features. Prior/current stop count describes whether the driver has already executed a strategy stop.
implementation_hint: Sort by race, driver, and lap; compute cumulative prior pit count from `PitStop`, cumulative count including the current row, no-prior-stop flags, current lap is pit stop, laps since last observed stop if inferable, and remaining one-stop debt proxies. Restore row order.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Current `PitStop` must not be confused with the next-lap target. Avoid using future pit stops or deriving next-lap labels from sequence shifts.
